query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as remaining FROM establishments WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' AND address NOT REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela)';

SELECT id, name, address, complement FROM establishments WHERE address IS NOT NULL AND address != '' AND address NOT REGEXP '^(Rua|Avenida|Alameda|Praça|Travessa|Largo|Estrada|Rodovia|Viela)' LIMIT 20;
